name: joshseane/-nmlp-mcp
description: First-edition identification — points of issue, number-line decoding, and publisher rules over a CC-BY, DOI-cited dataset of 6,717 titles — plus New Mexico book-donation logistics. Hosted remote server, no auth. Endpoint: https://newmexicoliteracyproject.org/api/mcp · Registry: `org.newmexicoliteracyproject/nmlp-mcp`
